name: cadDispatchUnit
_note: Flat params (RmsCadConsole CadTab.dispatch: lensRun('law-enforcement','cadDispatchUnit',{callId}) — auto-route omits unitId). Auto-routes the nearest AVAILABLE unit by Haversine when both call and unit carry lat/lon, else the first free unit; rejects with { ok:false } when the call is unknown or no unit is free. etaMinutes = round(km/40*60) only when all four coords are present, else null (the banner shows ETA ONLY when numeric — never a fabricated '0m'). The dispatch banner reads result.unit.callSign + result.etaMinutes EXACTLY; queue/board re-render from the mutated call.status='dispatched' / unit.status='dispatched'.
